name: Savayar
recipeInstructions:
Sift the flour.
Beat the egg yolks in a bowl with sugar and vanilla until thick and light.
In another bowl, beat whites until stiff but not dry.
Add whites alternately with flour to yolk mixture, folding gently.
Cover baking sheet with a piece of waxed paper.
Using a cookie press with a wide, flat opening, squeeze dough onto waxed paper in the shape of fat macaroni -- each cookie should be about 1/2 inch thick and 2 1/2 inches long.
Sprinkle cookies with a little sugar (brush excess from waxed paper or it will burn during baking), and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for about 15 minutes.
Cool slightly, then peel off the paper.
NOTE: Watch these carefully, as they bake quickly and the edges may burn.
